title: Statis' Better Mycelium Particles
description: This pack changes the mycelium particles to mushrooms and spores to make them a bit more visually interesting
body:
_M u s h r o o m s_


This pack changes the mycelium particles to mushrooms and spores to make them a bit more visually interesting
(especially good if you use packs that replace the "generic" particle as this pack introduces its own)

 ㅤ
 ㅤ

should work for mostly all versions
